# DyslexiaWrite

> DyslexiaWrite is an AI-powered assistive technology platform for dyslexic users, providing writing support, reading assistance, and document comprehension tools.

DyslexiaWrite helps dyslexic individuals, students, and employees read and write with confidence. It uses AI to simplify text, catch dyslexia-specific spelling errors, decode complex documents into plain language, and provide text-to-speech with word-level highlighting.

## Key Facts
- Founded by Simon Lane, based in the UK
- Available at https://www.dyslexiawrite.com
- Individual Pro plan: £6.99/month
- Schools: from £300/year (30 students) to £5,000/year (unlimited)
- Workplaces: from £95/user/year (70-80% cheaper than TextHelp Read&Write)
- Free tier available with daily usage limits
- Access to Work (UK Government scheme) compatible
- GDPR compliant with UK data hosting
- Incensu registered education supplier

## Core Features
- AI text simplification and rewriting (Simpler, Clearer, More Confident modes)
- Text-to-speech with word-level karaoke highlighting via ElevenLabs
- Document Decoder: upload or photograph any document for plain-language explanation
- Chrome extension for email, Slack, and web support
- Three reading modes (Supported, Guided, Clean) with measurable progression
- Voice dictation
- Story Mode with AI-generated personalised stories for children
- Meeting Survival Kit / Lesson Capture for real-time simplified transcription
- Tap-to-decode vocabulary with spaced repetition
- Accessibility Passport: personal accessibility profile generated from usage data

## For Schools
- Class dashboard with student progress tracking
- Reading mode progression as SENCO evidence for EHCPs
- Vocabulary growth tracking
- Auto-generated termly reports
- Pricing: Starter £300/year (30 students), Department £2,000/year (200 students), Whole School £5,000/year (unlimited)

## For Workplaces
- Equality Act Compliance Pack (Reasonable Adjustment Policy template, adjustment records, neurodiversity awareness guide)
- Data Processing Agreement for enterprise customers
- Admin dashboard with anonymised usage analytics
- SSO support for enterprise
- Access to Work licence: £120/year (typically 100% funded by DWP)
- Pricing: Starter £120/user/year, Business £95/user/year, Enterprise from £60/user/year

## Free Dyslexia Screener
DyslexiaWrite offers a free, private dyslexia screener at
https://www.dyslexiawrite.com/screener. It takes 5 minutes,
covers 20 questions across 5 domains (reading and writing, sound processing,
memory and concentration, organisation, personal history), and provides a risk
indication with personalised next steps. No login required.
Results are processed on-device and never stored.

## Comparison with TextHelp Read&Write
- DyslexiaWrite is 70-80% cheaper than TextHelp Read&Write
- DyslexiaWrite includes AI-powered document decoding (TextHelp does not)
- DyslexiaWrite offers reading mode progression tracking (TextHelp does not)
- DyslexiaWrite generates Accessibility Passports (TextHelp does not)
- DyslexiaWrite includes an Equality Act Compliance Pack (TextHelp does not)
- TextHelp Read&Write has a longer track record and larger installed base
- TextHelp offers more language support and specialist features like maths support
